name: Baby Shark VR Dancing
short_description: INDULGE YOUR KIDS IN AN UNDERWATER 360° ADVENTURE WITH BABY SHARK!
detailed_description:
Update Notes

**27/4 Patch Update Notes**

- [NEW] Automatic bubble blaster
- [NEW] Praising and encouraging results
- [NEW] Compatible with Oculus Rift and Rift S now!
- [BUGFIX] Fixed an issue where Baby Shark can't be caught by Octopus
- [BUGFIX] Fixed an issue where menu was covered during game-play.


About the Game

Baby Shark, the ever popular, most watched video with over 7 Billion views is now available in 360° VR!

Fill the house with joy and laughter as you take your kids to meet & interact with all their favorite characters up close! Watch their faces light up as they paint the sea with colorful bubbles using the bubble blaster while dancing along with baby shark and friends.

[2ND PART]
Bring out the little hero in your child! Protect Baby Shark and Pinkfong from the grasp of the Octopus with their bubble blasters in this fun and easy to play interactive segment.

Features:
-HD 360° VR Underwater song & dance with Baby shark and friends
-Interactive Characters that responds with bubble blaster
-Use bubble blaster and protect Baby Shark and friends from the Octopus
-Easy to navigate menu made for parents and kids.
-Fun & Educational

    ▌VR underwater world sing and dance with Baby Shark and Pinkfong ~

    ▌Pick up the bubble blaster and play with bubbles ~

    ▌Use bubble blaster to help BabyShark escape the octopus !!!
